tools.name: decompile
tools.description: Decompile function(s) at address(es); returns pseudocode and per-item errors.

tools.name: disasm
tools.description: Disassemble function with offset/max_instructions pagination and optional total count.

tools.name: func_profile
tools.description: Profile functions with summary metrics and optional sampled details.

tools.name: analyze_batch
tools.description: Run comprehensive analysis over one or more target functions.

tools.name: xrefs_to
tools.description: Return xrefs to address(es) or named symbols, capped per target with truncation flag.

tools.name: xref_query
tools.description: Query xrefs with direction/type filters and pagination.

tools.name: xrefs_to_field
tools.description: Get cross-references to structure fields

tools.name: callees
tools.description: Return unique callees per function, capped by limit.

tools.name: find_bytes
tools.description: Search byte patterns (supports ??) with offset/limit pagination.

tools.name: basic_blocks
tools.description: Return function CFG blocks with offset/max_blocks pagination.

tools.name: find
tools.description: Search strings/immediates/refs for targets with offset/limit pagination.

tools.name: insn_query
tools.description: Query instructions with mnemonic/operand filters and scoped scans.

tools.name: export_funcs
tools.description: Export function data for addresses in json/c_header/prototypes formats.

tools.name: callgraph
tools.description: Build bounded callgraph from roots with depth/node/edge limits.

tools.name: analyze_function
tools.description: Compact single-function analysis: pseudocode, strings, constants, callers, callees, xrefs, blocks.

tools.name: analyze_component
tools.description: Analyze related functions as a group: per-function summaries, internal call graph, shared data.

tools.name: diff_before_after
tools.description:
Rename a function, set its type, or add a comment, and immediately see the
before/after decompilation side by side. Use this instead of calling rename
then decompile separately when you want to verify that a rename or type change
actually improved readability. Actions: 'rename_func' (action_args: {name: str}),
'set_type' (action_args: {type: str}), 'set_comment' (action_args: {comment: str}).
Returns {before, after, action_applied, changes_detected}. Especially useful
during batch renaming to confirm each change had the intended effect.

tools.name: trace_data_flow
tools.description:
Follow cross-references from or to an address, automatically traversing
multiple hops. Use 'forward' to see where data flows TO (xrefs-from), or
'backward' to see where data flows FROM (xrefs-to). At each node in the
traversal, returns the function name, instruction, and whether it's code or
data. Use this when you find an interesting string, constant, or global and
want to understand every code path that touches it without manually chaining
xrefs_to calls. Do not use for call graph traversal - use callgraph for that.
max_depth controls how many hops to follow (default 5, max 20).

tools.name: server_health
tools.description: Health/ready probe for MCP server and current IDB state.

tools.name: server_warmup
tools.description: Warm up IDA subsystems to reduce first-call latency and transient failures.

tools.name: lookup_funcs
tools.description: Get functions by address or name (auto-detects)

tools.name: int_convert
tools.description: Convert numbers to different formats

tools.name: list_funcs
tools.description: List functions with optional filtering and offset/count pagination.

tools.name: func_query
tools.description: Query functions with richer filtering than list_funcs.

tools.name: list_globals
tools.description: List globals with optional filtering and offset/count pagination.

tools.name: entity_query
tools.description: Query IDB entities with typed filters, projection, and pagination.

tools.name: imports
tools.description: List imports with module names using offset/count pagination.

tools.name: imports_query
tools.description: Query imports with richer filtering than imports(offset,count).

tools.name: idb_save
tools.description: Save active IDB to disk, optionally to a provided path.

tools.name: find_regex
tools.description: Search strings by case-insensitive regex with offset/limit pagination.

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description:
List all discovered IDA Pro instances with their binary name, port, and reachability status.

Use this to see which IDA databases are currently open and available for analysis.
The 'active' field indicates which instance is currently handling your tool calls.

tools.name: select_instance
tools.description:
Switch to a different IDA Pro instance. All subsequent tool calls will be
routed to the selected instance. Use list_instances to see available instances.

To switch back to this instance, call select_instance with this instance's port,
or call select_instance with port=0 to reset.

tools.name: open_file
tools.description:
Open a file in a new IDA Pro instance.

Launches a new IDA process for the given binary. If an existing IDB/i64 database
is found, opens that directly (skips the packed/unpacked dialog). Use new_database=True
to force a fresh analysis. Use autonomous=True to suppress all IDA dialogs.

If switch=True (default), automatically routes subsequent tool calls to the new instance.

tools.name: get_bytes
tools.description: Read bytes from memory addresses

tools.name: get_int
tools.description: Read integer values from memory addresses

tools.name: get_string
tools.description: Read strings from memory addresses

tools.name: get_global_value
tools.description: Read global variable values by address or symbol name.

tools.name: patch
tools.description: Patch bytes at memory addresses with hex data

tools.name: put_int
tools.description: Write integer values to memory addresses

tools.name: set_comments
tools.description: Set comments at addresses (both disassembly and decompiler views)

tools.name: append_comments
tools.description: Append comments at addresses, deduping exact text by default.

tools.name: patch_asm
tools.description: Patch assembly instructions at addresses

tools.name: rename
tools.description: Batch-rename funcs/globals/locals/stack vars with dry-run options.

tools.name: define_func
tools.description: Define functions; IDA infers bounds unless end is provided.

tools.name: define_code
tools.description: Convert bytes to code instruction(s) at address(es).

tools.name: undefine
tools.description: Undefine item(s) at address(es), converting back to raw bytes.

tools.name: py_eval
tools.description: Execute Python in IDA context and return result/stdout/stderr.

tools.name: py_exec_file
tools.description:
Execute a Python script file in IDA context and return stdout/stderr.

Unlike py_eval, this runs the entire file with exec() using a single shared
globals dict (no locals split), so top-level definitions are visible to all
code in the script. Handles large scripts that would be unwieldy as inline code.

tools.name: stack_frame
tools.description: Return stack variables for function address(es).

tools.name: declare_stack
tools.description: Create stack variables from typed stack declarations.

tools.name: delete_stack
tools.description: Delete stack variables by name or offset.

tools.name: survey_binary
tools.description:
Get a compact overview of the binary in one call. Returns file metadata,
segment layout, entry points, statistics, top 15 strings and functions ranked
by xref count (functions include classification: thunk/wrapper/leaf/dispatcher/
complex), imports by category, and call graph summary. Use this as your FIRST
tool call when starting analysis. Do not call list_funcs, imports, or find_regex
separately for triage - this returns all of that. Use detail_level='minimal'
for binaries with >10k functions.

tools.name: declare_type
tools.description: Declare C type definitions in local type library.

tools.name: enum_upsert
tools.description: Create or extend local enums in an idempotent way.

tools.name: read_struct
tools.description: Read struct fields from memory at address; auto-detect type when possible.

tools.name: search_structs
tools.description: Search local structs/unions by name pattern.

tools.name: type_query
tools.description: Query local types with structured filters/projection-friendly output.

tools.name: type_inspect
tools.description: Inspect named types (size/kind/declaration/members).

tools.name: set_type
tools.description: Apply types (function/global/local/stack)

tools.name: type_apply_batch
tools.description: Apply multiple type edits and return aggregate status.

tools.name: infer_types
tools.description: Infer and apply likely types at target addresses.

resources.description: Get IDB file metadata (path, arch, base address, size, hashes)
Get all memory segments with permissions
Get entry points (main, TLS callbacks, etc.)
Get current cursor position and function
Get specific import details by name
Get specific export details by name
